title: SALKING Essential Oil Diffuser, 100ml Small Aromatherapy Diffuser, Ultrasonic Diffusers with Auto Shut-Off Function, Cool Mist Humidifier with Warm White Lights, for Office Home (White)
features: Compact and Versatile - Our small oil diffuser combines function and beauty in one compact design. Now available in classic white, this portable diffuser effortlessly complements any décor - from your bedroom and living room to your office or travel setup. Lightweight and easy to move, it lets you enjoy the soothing benefits of aromatherapy wherever you go.

All-in-One Button - Experience convenience at its finest with our intuitive one-button operation. With a single press, you can power the aromatherapy diffuser on or off and switch light modes with ease. Designed for effortless use, it’s perfect for anyone who wants instant aromatherapy without complicated settings.

Enhanced Night Light - Our ultrasonic diffuser create the perfect ambiance with 8 soft lighting options, including a cozy warm yellow glow. Whether used as a night light or for mood lighting, this gentle illumination adds a calming atmosphere to any space - ideal for relaxation, meditation, or bedtime routines.

BPA-Free and Whisper-Quiet Operation - Crafted from high-quality, BPA-free materials, this essential oil diffuser is safe for you and the environment. The ultrasonic technology ensures ultra-quiet operation, allowing you to relax, work, or sleep without interruptions—just pure, peaceful aromatherapy.

Automatic Shut-Off - Safety and peace of mind come first. When the water runs out, the auto shut-off feature automatically powers down the diffuser, preventing damage and ensuring safe use. Enjoy your favorite scents without the need for constant monitoring.
description: Product description SALKING compact aroma diffuser is not only functional but also a stylish addition to any home decor. With its sleek and modern design, it seamlessly blends into various interior styles, enhancing the overall aesthetic of your living space. Waterless Automatic Shut Off Safety System : Essential oils humidifier with a stable and reliable safety system, when the water is lower than the tank, it will turn off automatically. USB Powered & 8 Colorful Light: SALKING essential oils diffuser powered it with USB, 8 colors of the light which is one-color fixed mode. Small consumption, strong humidification: 1-2 drops of essential oil, make the water in the tank not exceed to 100ml and it can let your absorb the soothing air up to 3-5 hours. Whisper Quiet: It makes virtually zero noise while operating and refresh in rooms of 20-25m². essential oils humidifier almost silent ,it won't interfere with your sleep. Mini & Portable: Portable design, light in weight. SALKING essential oil humidifier boasts of mini and exquisite size. Without occupying much space, it easily gets a place on any table,office,bedroom,car. Perfect Gift Idea: Our compact aroma diffuser makes an excellent choice. It is a thoughtful gift for birthdays, holidays, housewarmings, or any special occasion. Give the gift of relaxation, wellness, and ambiance to your loved ones, allowing them to create their own oasis of calm and tranquility. Tips: Make sure the unit is sitting on a hard, flat surface. Do not place it on something soft, like a towel that could absorb the ultrasonic vibrations. Make sure the unit is not sitting directly under an air vent or fan that may be dispersing the mist. Package Contents: 1 x Aroma Diffuser 1 x USB Lead 1 x User Manual Safety Warning If your diffuser does not work, the first step is to make sure it is properly plugged in. Make sure the unit is sitting on a hard, flat surface. Do not place it on something soft. Our Diffusers are designed to first be put into the water and then Essential Oils. Do not use under wet conditions, please keep away from water. Only use the device in dry rooms.
